title: lespedeza bicolor f. niveoflora
intro: Lespedeza bicolor f. niveoflora, also known as White Flower Lespedeza, is a flowering plant of the legume family that is native to China and Korea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving blood circulation. Lespedeza bicolor f. niveoflora can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
